Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite its simple appearance,[n]the soup has a complex flavor[n]that's enhanced by the noodles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}No, not that. Wouldn't be here if I was sick of ramen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Dude, I've been sick of school since day one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}But I guess, yeah, you could say I'm sick of life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I mean, I get up, go to school, sit through lame-ass lectures, eat, watch TV, and go to bed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Okay, that settles it, {f 4 1}. I'm gonna get myself a girlfriend! Right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}What're you talking about!? I'm a smooth operator! Smooth as hell![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 2 5 101}What a cool thing to say! Soon I'll have a girlfriend and be just as cool as you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Alright, I think I'm gonna pull the trigger on my secret plan.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I told you about the teacher, right? I'm gonna ask her out and get her to fall in love with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Her name is Ms. Kanou. You heard of her? She teaches third-year ethics. We get along pretty well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}She's not mainstream beautiful, but she's really pretty. She's got these cute little eyes, a sexy body...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Uh, don't tell anyone about this, okay? You're the only one who knows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika told me more about his plan.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Dude, I'm getting so psyched! Let's cook up a plan of attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika and I chatted[n]on the walk home.[n]{f 1 1}
